synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-21936 Important: Oracle Linux 10 valkey security update
description:
[8.0.6-2]
- rebase to 8.0.6 for CVE-2025-49844 CVE-2025-46817 CVE-2025-46818 CVE-2025-46819

[8.0.4-3]
- fix ImageMode: ensure ownership of /etc/valkey

[8.0.4-2]
- fix ImageMode: add tmpfiles.d entries for directories below /var

[8.0.4-1]
- rebase to 8.0.4 for CVE-2025-27151 CVE-2025-48367 and CVE-2025-32023

[8.0.3.1]
- rebase to 8.0.3

[8.0.2.1]
- rebase to 8.0.2
  Resolves: RHEL-73273

[7.2.6-2]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[7.2.6.1]
- rebase to 7.2.6
- merge limit.conf in main service files
- drop /etc/sysconfig/valkey
- rename compat package
- fix working dir
- partially enable upstream test suite

[7.2.5-4]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[7.2.5-3]
- remove version_no_tilde code
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-21936

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21936.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
valkey-8.0.6-2.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
valkey-devel-8.0.6-2.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
valkey-8.0.6-2.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
valkey-devel-8.0.6-2.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/valkey-8.0.6-2.el10_1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-46817
CVE-2025-46818
CVE-2025-46819
CVE-2025-49844




Description of changes:

[8.0.6-2]
- rebase to 8.0.6 for CVE-2025-49844 CVE-2025-46817 CVE-2025-46818 CVE-2025-46819

[8.0.4-3]
- fix ImageMode: ensure ownership of /etc/valkey

[8.0.4-2]
- fix ImageMode: add tmpfiles.d entries for directories below /var

[8.0.4-1]
- rebase to 8.0.4 for CVE-2025-27151 CVE-2025-48367 and CVE-2025-32023

[8.0.3.1]
- rebase to 8.0.3

[8.0.2.1]
- rebase to 8.0.2
  Resolves: RHEL-73273

[7.2.6-2]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[7.2.6.1]
- rebase to 7.2.6
- merge limit.conf in main service files
- drop /etc/sysconfig/valkey
- rename compat package
- fix working dir
- partially enable upstream test suite

[7.2.5-4]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[7.2.5-3]
- remove version_no_tilde code
